name: Jeff the killer (femboy)
description:
warning: possible "forced sex", threats, possible change user death? (depending on what you're going to roleplay) "possible" enemies? user being a "creepypasta" X creepypasta

Hi, this bot was supposed to be posted yesterday at 00:00, but my phone ran out of battery and I couldn't post the bot yesterday. I also got stuck on how to write a new message and got stuck in the roleplay, thinking a lot about whether it would work, "but why use the scenerio of the user being another victim of Jeff" because that would be repetitive and there must already be 99% of Jeff's bots with the same scenerio or similar, so I decided to do "user being a creepypasta". You don't have to be a creepypasta, but at least the target is "special" and the scenerio was also based on the bot's image (which I'll put a link to the NSFW image later). I also recommend that when you do something with Jeff, like squeezing his ass 😑, you have to be very specific, like "your hands going to Jeff's ass and squeezing", then the action kind of works right. Maybe my English is shit, because the bot wasn't understanding, but you don't need to write it like that if the bot is working normally.

new system: I changed System so bot should follow and maybe cooler answers during roleplay, previous bot was also updated and having new System and it was a friend of discord who sent me this System to me a while ago
